testimonials.name: Anna K.
testimonials.text: Wonderful experience! My son now enjoys learning and his confidence has grown tremendously.

testimonials.name: Maria S.
testimonials.text: Professional and caring approach. My daughter's reading skills improved significantly!

testimonials.name: Piotr W.
testimonials.text: Amazing results! My son can now focus better and his grades have improved.

testimonials.name: Oksana L.
testimonials.text: My daughter struggled with reading, but now she reads confidently. Thank you for your patience!

testimonials.name: Tomasz K.
testimonials.text: Exceptional teacher! Our son's behavior and academic performance improved dramatically.

testimonials.name: Elena M.
testimonials.text: Highly recommend! A caring professional who truly understands children with special needs.

hero.heading: Empowering Children with Special Needs
hero.description: My individualized approach helps children overcome challenges and thrive socially and academically.
